summary: Stock Adjustments Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements and integrations working correctly. The POST /api/inventory/adjust endpoint correctly modifies stock, logs to stock_movements and stock_adjustment_logs collections. GET /api/reports/stock-adjustments returns complete stats with by_reason, by_ingredient, and logs. Frontend Stock tab has search/filter UI with data-testid attributes. Reports page shows 'Ajustes de Stock' under Inventario category.

backend: test_adjust_positive_quantity_returns_ok - Stock +2, returns ok:true with stock_before, stock_after, monetary_value
test_adjust_negative_quantity_returns_ok - Stock -1, returns ok:true with correct values
frontend: Stock tab clickable and loads multilevel stock data
Search input with data-testid='stock-search-input' present and functional
Warehouse filter dropdown with data-testid='stock-filter-warehouse' present
Category filter dropdown with data-testid='stock-filter-category' present
Adjust button with data-testid='adjust-btn' opens Ajustar Stock dialog
Ajustar Stock dialog has Insumo, Almacén, Cantidad, Razón fields
Search filtering works - shows 'Mostrando 1 de 1 registros'
Stock table displays PRESIDNTE CAJA 24 with multilevel breakdown (1 caja > 23 botella)
Movimientos Recientes section shows adjustment logs with 'ajuste' badge
Inventario, Almacén y Compras category in sidebar
'Ajustes de Stock' report accessible in sidebar
Stock Adjustments report renders with summary cards (Total Ajustes, Unidades Agregadas/Removidas, Impacto Neto)
Por Razón de Ajuste section shows reason breakdown
Por Insumo section shows ingredient breakdown
Detalle de Ajustes table shows all adjustment logs with Fecha, Insumo, Almacén, Cantidad, Antes, Después, Valor, Razón, Usuario

GET /api/reports/stock-adjustments.by_ingredient: array of {ingredient_id, name, adjustments, net_quantity, total_value}

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_stock_adjustments.py - Created comprehensive test suite for stock adjustment feature
seed_data_creation: Test adjustments created during testing - cleaned up with restore_stock_balance test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock adjustments feature fully implemented and tested. POST /api/inventory/adjust modifies stock and logs to both stock_movements (movement_type='adjustment') and stock_adjustment_logs collections. GET /api/reports/stock-adjustments provides dedicated report with stats, by_reason, by_ingredient breakdowns. Frontend Stock tab has search/filter with data-testid attributes. Reports page sidebar has 'Ajustes de Stock' under Inventario category. Admin PIN: 10000.
